ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Continued To Sep-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Niven for Co-Executors.

The Court stated that it received a declaration, but it needs to be a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Niven stated that she fully understands, that he has a first and final completely done, that he was waiting for some papers from the Executors, that he has received them and that he expects to e-file the petition tomorrow. Status on close of estate is continued to September 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chu. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executors and the Attorney to appear on August 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
